calendar.matters:
Petition For Production Of Decedent'S Will; To Compel Trustee To Provide A Copy Of Terms Of A Trust; To Report To Beneficiary Regarding A Trust; And T
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Production Of Decedent'S Will; To Compel Trustee To Provide A Copy Of Terms Of A Trust; To Report To Beneficiary Regarding A Trust; And T
Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Continued To Sep-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Angela Thompson, via Zoom, for Jodi Traverso, Petitioner; Brendan Brewer, via Zoom, for Stanford Hays, Respondent.

Ms. Thompson reports that the parties have resolved some issues and believes that the remaining issues can be resolved without a trial. The court advises Ms. Thompson that it needs a proposed order and will be requiring her to file a memorandum of points and authorities regarding Jodi Traverso's standing as an heir. The court advises that the notice issue will need to be cleared. The court advises that it will continue this matter one additional time with the intent to take the petition off calendar if the parties reach a complete settlement. The court advises the parties to be ready to provide a complete status of the case if it has not completely settled by the next calling of this matter.

The matter is continued to Sep-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens [Ccp 405.31]
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Production Of Decedent'S Will; To Compel Trustee To Provide A Copy Of Terms Of A Trust; To Report To Beneficiary Regarding A Trust; And T
Off Calendar Apr-05-2022 Continued To Jul-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Angela Thompson, via CourtCall, for Jodi Traverso, Petitioner; Brendan Brewer, via Zoom, for Stanford Hays, Respondent.

Ms. Thompson reports that Jill Traverso was personally served and references probate 17203 regarding notice and that other parties have been served via mail. The court notes that John Traverso is not present today. The court and counsel discuss the issues with this matter and that the court could dismiss this matter without prejudice and might be better suited to pursue in civil court. Mr. Brewer offers testimony regarding his client's position and reports that the will does not mention Ms. Thompson's client as a beneficiary. Ms. Thompson offers additional testimony and believes that the matter might be informally resolved. The court urges counsel to meet and confer.

The Petition for Production of Decedent's will, etc., is continued to Jul-05-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
